description.ko: 생물 발광 해파리와 열수 분출구가 어두운 바다에서 천연 빛의 쇼를 만들어내는 평온한 수중 장면입니다.
description.en: A serene underwater scene featuring bioluminescent jellyfish and hydrothermal vents, creating a natural light show in the dark ocean.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Aurora.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent jellyfish with long, translucent #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsate in rhythmic unison. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow, while in the background, ancient #006994 hydrothermal vents release bubbles that glow with thermal light. Photorealistic fluid dynamics, high-pressure deep sea atmosphere, 8k resolution, capturing a peaceful dance of transparent life in the abyss.
